description: In the 'Enterprise Software Development Project' in ProjectLibre, update the Cost Accrual settings for resources to reflect new payment terms. Set 'David Brown' (Database Administrator) to 'Start' and 'Emma Davis' (QA Engineer) to 'End', while leaving all other resources as 'Prorated'. Save the project as a Microsoft Project XML file to '/home/ga/Projects/resource_costs.xml'.
